title: How to Reserve a Spot for an Event
content:
If a user asks how to reserve an event:

- Guide them to the CultPass app
- Instruct them to browse the experience catalog and tap 'Reserve'
- If it's a premium or limited event, check if reservation confirmation is required via email
- Remind them to arrive at least 15 minutes early with their QR code visible

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can reserve an experience by opening the CultPass app, selecting your desired event, and tapping 'Reserve'. Be sure to arrive 15 minutes early with your QR code ready."

title: What's Included in a CultPass Subscription
content:
Each user is entitled to 4 cultural experiences per month, which may include:
- Art exhibitions
- Museum entries
- Music concerts
- Film screenings and more

Some premium experiences may require an additional fee (visible in the app).

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Your CultPass subscription includes 4 curated experiences each month. You can choose from museums, concerts, film events and more. Premium events may have an extra cost, which is shown during reservation."

title: How to Cancel or Pause a Subscription
content:
Users can manage their subscription via the app > 'My Account' > 'Manage Plan'.

- Cancel: Effective at the end of the billing cycle
- Pause: Preserves user data, resumes automatically when reactivated
- Do NOT offer refunds unless approved by support lead

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can cancel or pause your subscription at any time via the 'My Account' section in the CultPass app. Cancelation takes effect at the end of your billing cycle."

title: How to Handle Login Issues?
content:
Most login issues are resolved with password reset:

- Ask the user to tap 'Forgot Password' on the login screen
- Ensure they are using the correct registered email
- If they did not receive the reset email, check spam folder or retry after 10 minutes
- For persistent login issues, escalate to human support

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Try tapping 'Forgot Password' on the login screen. Make sure you're using the email associated with your account. If the email doesn't arrive, check spam or try again in a few minutes."

title: How to Change a Reserved Event
content:
Users can modify a reservation if the event allows changes.

- Open the CultPass app
- Go to 'My Reservations'
- Select the reservation and tap 'Modify' if available
- Choose a new date or session
- Changes may be restricted within 24 hours of the event

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can change your reservation through the 'My Reservations' section of the app. If modification is available, simply select a new date or session."

title: Missed Event Policy
content:
If a user misses a reserved event:

- The experience credit may be forfeited
- No-show policies vary by event partner
- Premium event fees are generally non-refundable
- Encourage users to cancel in advance if they cannot attend

**Suggested phrasing:**
"If you miss a reserved event, the experience credit may be used and any premium fees may not be refunded. We recommend canceling in advance whenever possible."

title: How to View Upcoming Reservations
content:
Users can see all booked experiences in one place.

- Open the CultPass app
- Navigate to 'My Reservations'
- Upcoming and past events are displayed separately
- QR codes become available before the event begins

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can view all your upcoming experiences in the 'My Reservations' section of the CultPass app."

title: How Experience Credits Work
content:
Experience credits refresh monthly based on the user's subscription.

- Standard subscribers receive 4 credits per month
- Unused credits do not roll over unless stated otherwise
- One reservation generally consumes one credit
- Premium events may require additional payment

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Your monthly experience credits refresh each billing cycle. Most experiences use one credit, while some premium events may require an additional fee."

title: Payment Method Management
content:
Users can update payment information through the app.

- Open 'My Account'
- Select 'Billing & Payments'
- Add, remove, or update payment methods
- Changes apply to future billing cycles

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can manage your payment methods in the 'Billing & Payments' section under 'My Account'."

title: How to Update Profile Information
content:
Users can update personal details directly within the app.

- Open 'My Account'
- Select 'Profile Settings'
- Update name, email, or contact information
- Save changes before exiting

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can update your profile details at any time from the 'Profile Settings' section of the CultPass app."

title: Waitlist for Fully Booked Events
content:
Some events support a waitlist when reservations are full.

- Users can tap 'Join Waitlist'
- Notifications are sent if a spot becomes available
- Waitlist placement does not guarantee entry
- Users should confirm quickly if notified

**Suggested phrasing:**
"If an event is fully booked, you may be able to join the waitlist and receive a notification if a spot opens up."

title: How Event Notifications Work
content:
CultPass sends reminders and updates for reserved experiences.

- Reservation confirmations are sent immediately
- Reminder notifications are typically sent before the event
- Schedule changes or cancellations trigger alerts
- Users should enable app notifications for the best experience

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You'll receive notifications about your reservations, including reminders and any important event updates."

title: Refund Policy for Premium Experiences
content:
Premium experiences may include additional fees.

- Fees are displayed before reservation confirmation
- Refund eligibility depends on the event organizer's policy
- Missed events are generally not refundable
- Escalate unusual cases to human support

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Refunds for premium experience fees depend on the event's policy. Please review the event details before confirming your reservation."

title: How to Contact Support
content:
Users can contact support when self-service options do not resolve an issue.

- Open the CultPass app
- Navigate to 'Help & Support'
- Browse help articles or submit a support request
- Include relevant screenshots when reporting issues

**Suggested phrasing:**
"If you need additional assistance, please visit the 'Help & Support' section in the CultPass app and submit a support request."
